channel.title: Tourism Troubles on The Guyana Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Tourism Troubles on The Guyana Brief

item.title: Saturday's Guyana Brief: Weekend News Circus
item.description:
📊 WEEKEND QUICK STATS

🎭 THE MOHAMEDS PLAY THE VICTIM CARD

The Mohameds are back with another performance, and this time they’re playing the victim. According to their lawyer, Sanjeev Datadin, the US wants to extradite them because they’re “Indian Guyanese” and “successful businessmen.”

Let’s Break This Down:

Their Argument: America is targeting them because of their ethnicity and success.

item.title: Friday's Guyana Brief: Storage Unit Edition
item.description:
📦 BREAKING: GUYANA VOLUNTEERS AS AMERICA’S STORAGE UNIT

In the wildest plot twist since the 2020 elections, Guyana is in “productive discussions” with the United States about accepting third-country nationals.

Let That Sink In: America wants to deport people from OTHER countries to Guyana. Not Americans. Not even people who’ve ever BEEN to Guyana. Just random third-country nationals that America doesn’t want.
